title: Why Aren't Businesses Using AI Agents Yet? Experts Explain! #shorts
summary: Cyril Imhof argues that slow agentic AI adoption reflects the technology's early maturity stage, similar to LLMs in their nascency. Businesses are beginning a race to capitalize on this emerging capability.
writeup: This short from Cyril Imhof addresses why enterprise adoption of AI agents lags despite growing interest. The argument: agentic AI is still in its infancy, comparable to the early deployment phases of LLMs, which limits how quickly businesses can put it into production. The takeaway is that adoption is expected to accelerate as the technology matures, with companies already racing to harness the emerging capability.
